Text.Page:
The argons hide behind layers of slaves, mercenaries, and shielding.

You'll have to kill the minions to reach the masters, but trust me, it'll be a blessing. I remember the pain, the shame...

No more chains, . Find those argon scum and gut them.

You saved Acarum before, and my life and my freedom in the bargain.

By driving off Suryati, you've ended the curse and helped me recover my honor.

I won't forget you.
